headline: Salesforce Downgraded On Views 'Agentforce, As A Product, Just Isn't There'
summary: KeyBanc downgraded Salesforce on views its AI strategy isn't jelling. Salesforce stock stumbled on the news as other software companies also retreated.

headline: Workday (WDAY) Stock Looks Fairly Valued Despite Fresh AI Growth Optimism
summary: Workday stock has had a tough run over the past year, yet current valuation checks suggest it is not an obvious bargain even after the pullback. With recent headlines highlighting growth in its enterprise software business and renewed attention on its AI capabilities, investors are weighing whether the current price already reflects those strengths. Workday shares are down 42.6% over the past year, which puts the focus on whether the recent weakness has simply reset expectations or signals...

headline: Workday (WDAY) Could Be 19% Undervalued After Risk Off Selling Hits Software
summary: Recent weakness in Workday (WDAY) has been tied to broader risk-off moves in growth software stocks after President Trump ended the Iran ceasefire, with higher oil prices and bond yields weighing on valuations. See our latest analysis for Workday. Beyond the latest sell off, Workday’s share price has been volatile, with a 21.95% 90 day share price return sitting against a year to date share price decline of 33% and a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 42.59%. This suggests recent...

headline: Workday (WDAY) Appoints John Lombard To Lead Asia Pacific Growth
summary: Workday (NasdaqGS:WDAY) has appointed John Lombard as President for Asia Pacific. Lombard will lead the company’s regional growth and go to market strategy across key APAC markets. The move highlights Workday’s focus on expanding its enterprise cloud applications footprint in Asia Pacific. For investors tracking Workday, the appointment comes at a time when the stock trades around $137.88, with the share price down 33.0% year to date and 42.6% over the past year.
